title: Banned-template purpose list: persistent rejection of known noise templates (closes D017 first-occurrence gap)

evidence.ref: PR #74 cycle-37 with purpose 'Ensure a unique accepted decision fixture validates successfully (1780486044)' merged after D017

examples: Seed entry (this decision): 'ensure a unique accepted decision fixture validates successfully' — the cycle-N template the dumb-agent has been re-filing since D015 landed. After D018
any fixture whose purpose normalizes to this is rejected unconditionally
even if it is the only such fixture in the set.
